forever.name: no-bare-except-pass
forever.description: Bare except: pass blocks silently swallow errors. Excludes ebook_drm vendored code.

forever.name: primary-classes-must-inherit-igorbase
forever.description: D125 enforcement: primary component classes (cognition/, memory/, tools/, network/, brainstem/) must inherit IgorBase. Exempts classes whose only bases are third-party (BaseModel, Enum, ABC, dataclass, etc.).

forever.name: no-sqlite-imports
forever.description: Postgres-only data path for Igor (theigors/rules/database). Check catches re-introductions of SQLite in Igor's data path. Excludes legitimate external SQLite consumers (Calibre catalog, Kindle DRM keychain). T-remove-sqlite-references was the cleanup; this is reintroduction prevention.

forever.name: no-hardcoded-instance-refs
forever.description: T-hardcoded-instance-refs (#458): Igor runtime reads instance identifiers from config, not string literals. 'Igor-wild-0001' and 'choose_a_password' live in paths.py, docstrings, and the node_id constant (the settled exempt list from the 2026-04-15 sprint).

forever.name: no-cortex-store-bypass
forever.description: T-cortex-store-bypass-audit: per DP4 (single chokepoint), runtime tools/ write memories through cortex.store(). Exempts seed_*.py and memory_sync.py.

forever.name: callmap-fresh
forever.description: docs/callmap.md must match what callmap.py would currently produce

forever.name: levers-doc-skill-sync
forever.pattern: git log --oneline --since='25 hours ago' --name-only -- '.claude/skills/' | grep -q '\.md$' && ! git log --oneline --since='25 hours ago' --name-only -- 'docs/Deterministic_AI_Development_Levers_A_layer_on_top_of_skills.md' | grep -q 'Levers'; echo 'OK'
forever.description: When a skill file was modified in the last day, the levers doc should also be updated. Fires a warning if skill changed but levers doc unchanged.

forever.name: basedevice-must-emit-traces
forever.description: T-audit-check-missing-traces: every rack device (BaseDevice subclass) must call trace_record() so /diagnose has structured JSONL traces. Severity MED — traces are observability infrastructure, not blocking.

forever.name: negative-confidence-memories
forever.pattern: SELECT memory_type, COUNT(*) FROM clan.memories WHERE (metadata->>'confidence')::float < 0 GROUP BY memory_type
forever.description: Shankar loop: surface PROCEDURAL/SEMANTIC memories with confidence < 0 (actively wrong). These should be reviewed or corrected.

forever.name: palace-decay-detection
forever.pattern: SELECT path, title, updated_at, NOW() - updated_at AS age FROM adc.palace WHERE updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY updated_at ASC LIMIT 20
forever.description: Palace nodes not updated in 30+ days may be stale. Surface for spot-check — Akien approves all changes. Distinct from capability_map drift check.

forever.name: basedevice-interface-logging
forever.description: BaseDevice methods that directly invoke interface-crossing primitives (subprocess spawn, post_to_channel) must contain a log call so the crossing is traceable. Flags the 'no log at all' case; partial logging is caught by code review.
